description: Style NoteGo for a look that is bold and beautiful with this handmade necklace from adrika. Its stylish design adds a touch of glamour to your wardrobe. Pair it with any outfit for a look that is ethnic yet modern.Product DetailsSingle strand necklace with brown plastic semi-cut and fabric woven beadsMaterial and CarePlastic semi-cut and fabric woven beadsWipe with soft cloth to maintain shine and keep away dust and dirtSizeLength of necklace: 127 cm
